scripts.text:
Insert into processing.INTEGRATION_STATUS (source_table_name,sink_table_name,source_count, sink_count, recon_status )
        values (@source_table_name,@sink_table_name, @source_count, @sink_count, @recon_status);

INSERT INTO Status(Load_Type, pipeline_run_id, pipeline_start_date, pipeline_end_date, insert_record_count, processed_status)
VALUES(@Load_Type, @pipeline_run_id, @pipeline_start_date, @pipeline_end_date, @insert_record_count, @processed_status)

INSERT INTO Status(Load_Type, pipeline_run_id, pipeline_start_date, pipeline_end_date, insert_record_count, processed_status)
VALUES(@Load_Type, @pipeline_run_id, @pipeline_start_date, @pipeline_end_date, @insert_record_count, @processed_status)
